footballDataApiKey.title: Football-Data API Key
footballDataApiKey.description: Your API key from football-data.org. Get a free key at football-data.org — takes 30 seconds, no credit card.

matchId.title: Match ID
matchId.description: Match ID to fetch. Required when mode is 'match'.

teamId.title: Team ID
teamId.description: Optional team ID filter for completed matches (mode: full).
